mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_entry_term ( id, descriptor_id, term, lexical_tag, is_print_flag, record_preferred, is_permuted_term, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.descriptorId}, #{item.term}, #{item.lexicalTag}, #{item.isPrintFlag}, #{item.recordPreferred}, #{item.isPermutedTerm}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
